name: AJ Jolly Park
description: Come play pickleball at AJ Jolly Park in Alexandria, KY! There are 3 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Alexandria Community Center
description: Alexandria Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alexandria, KY. There are 2 indoor wood courts. You’ll have to create your own lines, but portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Cold Spring Community Center
description: Cold Spring Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Cold Spring, KY. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Ft Thomas Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ft Thomas Pickleball Courts in Fort Thomas, KY! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Municipal Park
description: Municipal Park is a place to play pickleball in Cold Spring, KY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Tower Park
description: There are 6 pickleball courts with permanent lines overlayed on the tennis courts.

name: Town & Country Athletic Center
description: Come play pickleball at Town & Country Athletic Center in Newport, KY! There are 10 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, lights, food, and water.
fees: Fee required — $5 member / $10 non-member per day or can pay monthly/annually
